goal: Implement the coding-effector adapter that drives Claude Code as a tool under a spec-in / verified-out contract (ADR-0005, SPEC 11A).
acceptance_tests: drive_coding_effector(spec) runs the effector inside the target repo and returns only after the Definition-of-Done gate is evaluated
the effector's result is accepted only when the gate passes; on failure the adapter surfaces the findings and does not report success
the boundary emits an effector_session span with token/dollar cost, transcript reference, internal retry count, and the git diff
the effector is invoked behind a stable interface so an alternate harness can be substituted without changing callers
constraints: effector output untrusted until the gate passes
